acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_F001] PASS if the revised text between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:279 includes (a) one explicit attempted action by Marisol based on the new evidence, (b) one immediate external consequence from Ada/Nora, and (c) a final paragraph grounded in a concrete next obstacle (named person/process/document), not an abstract maxim. FAIL if the sequence remains primarily policy explanation plus generalized reflection.

[chapter_04_F002] PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:243 contains at least one direct emotionally loaded question and a response that visibly alters leverage (trust reduced, help conditioned, or access threatened). FAIL if Marisol still bypasses emotional confrontation for purely procedural talk.

[chapter_04_F003] PASS if, from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:99 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:244, each major exchange adds new actionable information or a new constraint; no repeated warning appears twice without adding consequence. FAIL if repeated caution statements remain functionally redundant.

[FBR-C01-001] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1048 no longer references spring training and the replacement cue is seasonally plausible for late autumn; fail if out-of-season baseball timing remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised text between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:279 includes (a) one explicit attempted action by Marisol based on the new evidence, (b) one immediate external consequence from Ada/Nora, and (c) a final paragraph grounded in a concrete next obstacle (named person/process/document), not an abstract maxim. FAIL if the sequence remains primarily policy explanation plus generalized reflection.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the chapter's peak discovery: after the T.V. reveal, pressure is repeatedly redirected into policy language and compliance instructions, so confrontation is explained rather than forced into an on-page costly choice. The ending then resolves into abstraction instead of concrete consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the Nora-intervention block between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:147, plus the exit movement between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:279. Keep one policy statement, then convert the rest into action: Marisol makes a specific boundary-pushing move, another character enforces a limit, and the scene leaves a tangible procedural or relational cost on-page.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:243 contains at least one direct emotionally loaded question and a response that visibly alters leverage (trust reduced, help conditioned, or access threatened). FAIL if Marisol still bypasses emotional confrontation for purely procedural talk.
findings.problem: Timidity: at the emotional high point, Marisol suppresses the hardest questions and pivots to logistics, which retreats from the emotional reality the scene has established.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:243, replace the swallow-and-pivot beat with one direct, high-risk question about Salvador/Tomas/Ada's prior knowledge, and force a consequential response (answer, refusal, or new boundary) that changes the interpersonal temperature.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:99 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:244, each major exchange adds new actionable information or a new constraint; no repeated warning appears twice without adding consequence. FAIL if repeated caution statements remain functionally redundant.
findings.problem: Escalation stalls because the same caution beat is reiterated by multiple speakers (limits of proof, limits of sharing, limits of speech) instead of converting each beat into new causal movement.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten duplicated caution language between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:31 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:37, and between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:107 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:139. Preserve one clear methodological warning, then use the recovered space for a new obstacle with immediate plot effect (for example: specific request protocol, pre-emptive legal flag, or narrowed access condition).

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1048 no longer references spring training and the replacement cue is seasonally plausible for late autumn; fail if out-of-season baseball timing remains.
findings.problem: Seasonal continuity contradiction: chapter_04 is in the continuity sheet's late-autumn block (chapters 01-05), but the narration references 'spring training news,' which breaks the timeline's seasonal track.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the opening beat at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1046-1050 so the radio/sports detail is late-autumn plausible (offseason trade talk, winter meetings, or postseason recap) while preserving the same ambient texture and pressure entering conservation spaces.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
